so was the original patch too big to backport and hence we do this instead?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> so was the original patch too big to backport and hence we do this instead?

Yes, the 1st problem it is big(https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/52094). The second one is that it introduced a regression - https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-17770. I have a fix for that and it will be ready for review in a couple of days, however, it will take some time to be landed.
Change has been successfully cherry-picked as 92c75b7e9fc0616fa660fce3a69f823524297d1c by Oleg Drokin

parents.subject: LU-15163 osd: osd_obj_map_recover() to restart transaction

commit.subject: LU-17034 quota: tmp fix against memory corruption
commit.message:
LU-17034 quota: tmp fix against memory corruption

Change QMT_INIT_SLV_CNT from 64 to 2000 to avoid accessing
memory out of array lqeg_arr. It could happen when at least
one of OSTs has index larger than the whole number of OSTs.
It is a temporary solution and maximum supported OST index
is 0x7d0. Later it will be changed with the longterm
solution.

Signed-off-by: Sergey Cheremencev <scherementsev@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I8d9444017fa9847142f3df77c63368282ff134c4
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/55035
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Stephane Thiell <sthiell@stanford.edu>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
